input.Issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
input.Subject: How to Remove a User

input.exact_quote: You can remove access for any user or team from an interview template.
input.response: I cannot perform the action directly, but you can remove access for any user from an interview template by following these steps: 1. Go to Interviews > Templates. 2. Click the More options (⋮) menu next to the template and select Share. 3. In the Share Interview Template dialog box, select the user or team you want to remove. 4. Select Remove User from the drop-down menu. 5. Click Confirm in the confirmation dialog box.
